ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "polling_day" TEXT /* Date of the main polling day */,
  "results_announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the results were announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_chairpersons" (
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chairperson */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the chairperson started their term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the chairperson ended their term */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the chairperson */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the chairperson */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party the chairperson is affiliated with */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous political or professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chairperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party chairperson during the election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received */,
  "seats_won" TEXT /* Number of seats won (e.g., 27 / 104) */,
  "seat_change" INTEGER /* Change in the number of seats compared to the previous election */,
  "government_status" TEXT /* Whether the party was in government or opposition */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of valid votes */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of invalid votes */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage swing in votes compared to the previous election */,
  "coalition_status" TEXT /* Whether the party was part of a coalition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES party_chairpersons ("chairperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_government_status FOREIGN KEY ("government_status") REFERENCES party_positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Government, Opposition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of election statistics */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "number_of_parties" INTEGER /* Number of political parties participating */,
  "number_of_candidates" INTEGER /* Number of candidates running for office */,
  "early_voting_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of early voting turnout */,
  "mail_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of mail ballots cast */,
  "in_person_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes cast */,
  "average_turnout_per_constituency" REAL /* Average voter turnout per constituency */,
  "highest_turnout_constituency" TEXT /* Name of the constituency with the highest turnout */,
  "lowest_turnout_constituency" TEXT /* Name of the constituency with the lowest turnout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_statistics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Specific action taken during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
